Extraordinary—whether new or old,Friends do not have to be understood separately…Because friends are not just people,Friends are an invisible bond of relationship.Friends mean laughing together,And the right to be angry without hesitation.Friends mean understanding even if you don't say it,Being there even if you are silent.Friends mean sharing happiness even if you don't call,And sharing sadness without asking.Equal happiness, equal sadness—Without any calculation, without any conditions.Friendship is not actually time,Friendship is the name of feelings—Which is yours even if it is new,And never gets old even if it is old.
